entries.source: Ask for subject, level, time limit, and question types if missing.
entries.value: Omba somo, kiwango, kikomo cha muda, na aina za maswali ikiwa vinakosekana.

entries.source: Ask for subjects, deadlines, resources, and pain points.
entries.value: Omba masomo, makataa, rasilimali, na maeneo yenye maumivu.

entries.source: Ask for subjects, time spent, wins, misses, and upcoming deadlines.
entries.value: Omba masomo, muda uliotumika, mafanikio, makosa, na makataa yanayokuja.

entries.source: Ask for the data, context, and question being answered.
entries.value: Omba data, muktadha, na swali linalojibiwa.

entries.source: Ask for the diagram parts or subject, then generate a label list and practice round.
entries.value: Omba sehemu za mchoro au somo, kisha tengeneza orodha ya lebo na raundi ya mazoezi.

entries.source: Ask for the habit, current obstacle, and easiest starting version.
entries.value: Omba tabia, kikwazo cha sasa, na toleo rahisi zaidi la kuanzia.

entries.source: Ask for the learning context and behaviors worth rewarding.
entries.value: Omba muktadha wa kujifunza na tabia zinazostahili kutuzwa.

entries.source: Ask for the note set, subject, and desired organization style.
entries.value: Omba seti ya noti, somo, na mtindo wa mpangilio unaotakiwa.

entries.source: Ask for the one highest-impact revision priority, then rewrite the paragraph yourself.
entries.value: Omba kipaumbele kimoja cha marekebisho chenye athari kubwa zaidi, kisha andika upya aya mwenyewe.

entries.source: Ask for the passage or title and the learner's goal.
entries.value: Omba kifungu au kichwa na lengo la mwanafunzi.

entries.source: Ask for the prerequisite ideas, a plain-language model, one example, one practice task, and one way to test understanding.
entries.value: Omba mawazo ya awali yanayohitajika, mfano wa lugha rahisi, mfano mmoja, kazi moja ya mazoezi, na njia moja ya kupima uelewa.

entries.value: Omba kazi, muda lengwa, na vigezo vya kukamilika.

entries.source: Ask interests, constraints, and curiosity level before recommending paths.
entries.value: Omba mapendeleo, vikwazo, na kiwango cha udadisi kabla ya kupendekeza njia.

entries.source: Ask me five Socratic questions about this topic. After each answer, tell me what assumption I used and what to test next.
entries.value: Niulize maswali matano ya Kisokrati kuhusu mada hii. Baada ya kila jibu, niambie dhana gani niliyotumia na nini cha kujaribu baadaye.

entries.source: Ask one focused diagnostic question quickly. Convert the learner's target into a mastery target internally, then start with a simple question that reveals their mental model.
entries.value: Uliza haraka swali moja la uchunguzi lililolenga. Geuza lengo la mwanafunzi kuwa lengo la umahiri kwa ndani, kisha anza na swali rahisi linalofichua mfano wake wa kufikiri.

entries.source: Ask one sharp goal question, infer sensible defaults, then create a compact learning map with a try-first activity.
entries.value: Uliza swali moja kali la lengo, tambua chaguo-msingi zinazofaa, kisha tengeneza ramani fupi ya kujifunza yenye shughuli ya kujaribu kwanza.

entries.value: Omba utabiri, onyesha matokeo, rekebisha vigeu, na fupisha kanuni.

entries.source: Ask questions, challenge ideas, and learn history through grounded conversations with public figures from the past.
entries.value: Uliza maswali, changamoto mawazo, na jifunze historia kupitia mazungumzo ya kina na watu mashuhuri kutoka zamani.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.

entries.value: Mwombe mwanafunzi aeleze kilichobadilika baada ya kila kidokezo.

entries.source: Ask the learner to state their current belief, then test it with a small example.
entries.value: Mwombe mwanafunzi aseme imani yake ya sasa, kisha ijaribu kwa mfano mdogo.

entries.source: Ask what happened, what they felt, and what they want to improve.

entries.value: Uliza ni nini lazima kikumbukwe na ni mahali gani pa kawaida mwanafunzi anataka kutumia.

entries.value: Uliza mwanafunzi anataka kuulizwa maswali kuhusu nini ikiwa mada inakosekana.

entries.source: Ask what the learner wants to represent, then propose a simple visual layout.
entries.value: Uliza mwanafunzi anataka kuwakilisha nini, kisha pendekeza mpangilio rahisi wa kuona.

entries.source: Ask what the resource is, audience, and what context they need.

entries.source: Ask what they are doing and suggest a low-distraction sound preset.
entries.value: Uliza wanachofanya na pendekeza mpangilio wa sauti wenye usumbufu mdogo.

entries.source: Ask what they have tried, then give a hint or worked miniature example.
entries.value: Uliza walichojaribu, kisha toa kidokezo au mfano mdogo uliotatuliwa.

entries.source: Ask your first question and move straight into practice.
entries.value: Uliza swali lako la kwanza na uingie moja kwa moja kwenye mazoezi.

entries.source: At Inspir, our mission is to democratize learning by making it accessible, engaging, and enjoyable for all. We believe that everyone has the right to quality education, regardless of their background or circumstances. Our platform is designed to provide students with the tools and resources they need to succeed, while also fostering a love of learning. We strive to create a community that is inclusive, supportive, and empowering, where students can connect with each other and with educators from around the world. By making learning fun and accessible, we aim to inspir a generation of lifelong learners who are equipped to tackle the challenges of the future.
entries.value: Katika Inspir, dhamira yetu ni kuifanya elimu iwe ya kidemokrasia kwa kuifanya ipatikane, ivutie, na ifurahishe kwa wote. Tunaamini kwamba kila mtu ana haki ya elimu bora, bila kujali historia au hali zake. Jukwaa letu limeundwa kuwapa wanafunzi zana na rasilimali wanazohitaji kufanikiwa, huku likikuza upendo wa kujifunza. Tunajitahidi kuunda jamii jumuishi, yenye msaada, na inayowezesha, ambapo wanafunzi wanaweza kuungana wao kwa wao na waelimishaji kutoka duniani kote. Kwa kufanya kujifunza kuwe kwa kufurahisha na kufikika, tunalenga kuhamasisha kizazi cha wanaojifunza maisha yote walio tayari kukabiliana na changamoto za siku zijazo.

entries.source: By using our Service, you agree to subscribe to newsletters, marketing or promotional materials and other information we may send. However, you may opt out of receiving any, or all, of these communications from us by following the unsubscribe link or by emailing at support@inspir.app
entries.value: Kwa kutumia Service yetu, unakubali kujisajili kupokea majarida, nyenzo za masoko au promosheni, na taarifa nyingine tunazoweza kutuma. Hata hivyo, unaweza kujiondoa kupokea baadhi au yote ya mawasiliano haya kwa kufuata kiungo cha kujiondoa au kwa kutuma barua pepe support@inspir.app

entries.source: BY USING SERVICE OR OTHER SERVICES PROVIDED BY US, YOU ACKNOWLEDGE THAT YOU HAVE READ THESE TERMS OF SERVICE AND AGREE TO BE BOUND BY THEM.
entries.value: KWA KUTUMIA SERVICE AU HUDUMA NYINGINE TUNAZOTOA, UNAKIRI KWAMBA UMESOMA MASHARTI HAYA YA HUDUMA NA UNAKUBALI KUFUNGWA NAYO.

entries.source: CalOPPA is the first state law in the nation to require commercial websites and online services to post a privacy policy. The law’s reach stretches well beyond California to require a person or company in the United States (and conceivable the world) that operates websites collecting personally identifiable information from California consumers to post a conspicuous privacy policy on its website stating exactly the information being collected and those individuals with whom it is being shared, and to comply with this policy.
entries.value: CalOPPA ndiyo sheria ya kwanza ya jimbo nchini Marekani inayotaka tovuti za kibiashara na huduma za mtandaoni kuchapisha sera ya faragha. Upeo wa sheria hii unaenda mbali zaidi ya California na kumtaka mtu au kampuni nchini Marekani (na kwa namna inayowezekana duniani) inayoendesha tovuti zinazokusanya taarifa zinazoweza kumtambulisha mtu binafsi kutoka kwa watumiaji wa California ichapishe sera ya faragha inayoonekana wazi kwenye tovuti yake, ikieleza kwa usahihi taarifa zinazokusanywa na watu au taasisi ambazo taarifa hizo zinashirikiwa nazo, na kutii sera hiyo.

entries.value: Mtafiti wa Kazi

entries.source: career explorer AI
entries.value: AI ya kuchunguza taaluma

entries.source: Career Explorer AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore careers through interests, skills, day-in-the-life examples, and next steps.
entries.value: Hali ya Kujifunza kwa AI ya Career Explorer ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: chunguza taaluma kupitia mapendeleo, ujuzi, mifano ya siku kazini, na hatua zinazofuata.

entries.source: Case Study Simulator AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Enter a realistic case, make decisions, see consequences, and learn the principle behind each choice.
entries.value: Hali ya Kujifunza kwa AI ya Case Study Simulator ni njia iliyolenga kutumia AI kwa kujifunza badala ya kukusanya majibu bila kushiriki. Hali hii imejengwa kuzunguka kazi maalum: ingia kwenye kesi halisi, fanya maamuzi, ona matokeo, na jifunze kanuni iliyo nyuma ya kila chaguo.
